description: Populates a Jellyfin Movies library with your personalised YouTube recommended feed. Videos are fetched via yt-dlp using your browser cookies and streamed directly from YouTube's CDN. No YouTube API key or Invidious instance required.
name: YouTube Feed
overview: Browse your YouTube recommended feed in Jellyfin

versions.changelog: Initial release. Library-based architecture using .strm files and a lightweight 302-redirect proxy. No ffmpeg in the proxy path — Jellyfin streams directly from YouTube CDN.
